stages.evidence: “I’d do the first one with times, because then I can just look at it and go.” / “That’s easy enough. Short and not annoying.”
stages.reason: The user explicitly prefers a time-based, easy-to-scan plan and describes it as short and not annoying, which strongly संकेतs a preference for simple bullets/checklist-style formatting.
